badges.name: First Claim
badges.criteria: First accepted bounty claim or valid proof submission.

badges.name: Shipped Fix
badges.criteria: Merged engineering fix with reproducible validation notes.

badges.name: Security Scout
badges.criteria: Validated security finding, responsible disclosure, or accepted audit report.

badges.name: Public Goods Writer
badges.criteria: Sourced educational content, thread, recap, or research note.

badges.name: Design Steward
badges.criteria: Production-ready design assets, style systems, or accessibility-ready visuals.

badges.name: Translation Bridge
badges.criteria: Reviewed translation that preserves technical meaning and formatting.

badges.name: Reputation Builder
badges.criteria: Durable proof trail across completed bounties, receipts, or contributor records.

badges.name: Maintainer Signal
badges.criteria: Meaningful triage, review, curation, or maintainer support work.
